DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_DASH.title: Drunken Dash
DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_DASH.description: Choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Skills in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Intoxicate[/purple] [blue]{Intoxicate}[/blue].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_STUPOR.title: Drunken Stupor
DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_STUPOR.descripti: Whenever you play a Power card, apply [blue]{HangoverPower}[/blue] [gold]Hangover[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HIGH_TOLERANCE.title: High Tolerance
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HIGH_TOLERANCE.descripti: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. At the start of combat, gain [blue]{HangoverPower}[/blue] [gold]Hangover[/gold].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-TIPSY_SHOT.title: Tipsy Shot
DIONYSUSANCIENT-TIPSY_SHOT.description: Whenever you use a potion, its effect is applied an additional time.
DIONYSUSANCIENT-WORRY_FREE.title: Worry Free
DIONYSUSANCIENT-WORRY_FREE.description: Gain a random amount of Max HP between [blue]{MinMaxHp}[/blue] to [blue]{MaxMaxHp}[/blue], but how much HP you have becomes a mystery.
